text: In terms of research and development (R&D) investment, Apple has maintained a consistent intensity relative to revenue, averaging 6.66% over the period (calc_id_2ad43936-d349-49e9-85d2-d3bf3081b852). This level of investment suggests that Apple continues to prioritize innovation and product development, which is crucial for sustaining its competitive edge in the technology sector.
